CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Nov-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Stay Under C.C.P. 664.6 And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Jeffery Mukai;
Off Calendar Jul-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Stay Under C.C.P. 664.6 And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to vacate stay and enter judgment pursuant to stipulation is granted. No opposition filed. While Wells Fargo asks that a stay and dismissal be vacated, the court's records do not show that either a stay order was issued or a dismissal entered in this case. However, Wells Fargo has shown that it is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Nancy Tran of $816.89, inclusive of costs.

Plaintiff's Counsel to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
